description: Bottom of a legal document. Location: Fustat. Dated: Adar 1455 Seleucid = February/March 1144 CE, under the authority of the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. Declaration given on request stating that someone had been under tarsim (house arrest) for a period of time.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
